content.en:
What a mysterious existence is the Void Source Palace, and Ye Jinpeng never expected that his ancestor would be the master of the Void Source Palace?

Seriously, he really didn't believe it.

But if Ye Tian was not the master of the Void Source Palace, why could a word make him a son of the Void?

At this time, Ye Tian said: "Jin Peng, if you break through the first layer of the Void Tower, you will be the Son of the Void, and if you break through the second layer of the Void Tower, you will be the Void Divine Son, and in the entire Source Sea, there are not many Void Divine Sons, only thirty-nine, and there is not a Void Divine Son in the Tianlin Realm." And if you break through the third layer of the Void Tower, you can become the Lord of the Void, and if you become the Lord of the Void, you can become the master of the Void Source Palace. And you, Ancestor, and I, are a Lord of the Void, and the only Lord of the Void!"

"Old Ancestor is amazing!"

Ye Jinpeng admired incomparably.

Ye Tian said: "Next, you will cultivate in the Void Source Palace, and I will disguise you as a Void God Son, so that you can always comprehend the Void Source Monument, but I will not give you too many points, only 10,000 points in total." After all, I can't help you all the time, otherwise it will hurt you if you develop a dependent nature!"

Ye Jinpeng hurriedly said: "Ancestor, you have already helped me a lot!"

In the days that followed, Ye Jinpeng cultivated in the Void Source Palace, often participated in the Void Source Monument, and his strength improved rapidly.

Maybe Ye Jinpeng can't become the top existence in the source sea, but it is not difficult to become a supreme being.

When the time comes, Ye Tian will cultivate another supreme being, and the Dark Forbidden Domain will be able to evolve into an eternal heaven and earth.

And that's one of his goals.

......

Now, Ye Tian is a first-class invincible, what he needs to do is to continue to cultivate his cultivation and endless source body to the peak realm, and then he can impact the supreme realm.

Ye Tian could choose to condense the Eternal Tribulation Body in the first-class Invincible Realm, or he could directly choose to break through to the Supreme Tribulation Realm without condensing the Eternal Tribulation Body.

It is still beneficial to condense the Eternal Tribulation Body, at least it can increase the fit between itself and the Eternal Source Body, which can be increased to 30%, and the Endless Source Body after the second growth can increase the fit by 50%.

In other words, after condensing the Eternal Tribulation Body, Ye Tian's fit with all the Eternal Source Objects could reach 80%.

Although 100% of them can't perfectly absorb the Eternal Source Thing, a secret method of absorbing the Void Source Tablet left by the Void Source Ancestor can increase some fit, plus there is also a treasure that enhances the fit of the Void Source Tablet - the Void Source Heart, which comes from the heart of a Devouring Source Dragon King.

This kind of treasure can enhance the fit by at least 30%, so it can allow Ye Tian to perfectly absorb the origin of the Void Source Monument.

This was why the Void Source Ancestor was confident that his heirs would be able to perfectly break through to the Supreme with the Void Source Tablet Origin plus a large number of other Eternal Source Origin Origins, so if Ye Tian wanted to break through with a large number of various Eternal Source Origin Origins, he had to condense the Eternal Tribulation Body.

The Eternal Tribulation is an evolved version of the Invincible Body, and although the Endless Source Body is very powerful and has even completed its second growth, it is still a type of Invincible Body.

Ordinary invincible robbers need a lot of special resources to evolve into invincible robbers, and countless first-class invincibles can't collect those special resources after working hard for a long time.

It is conceivable that if Ye Tian wants to evolve the Endless Source Body into the Endless Eternal Tribulation Body, how many special resources should he need?

And these special resources are called eternal resources in the source sea.

Treasures similar to the Void Source Crystal are not eternal resources, and the value of an eternal resource does not exceed that of the Eternal Source Object, but because it is too rare, it cannot be bought at all, and there is no power to sell it.

Even if you are a supreme, it is difficult to gather eternal resources.

For example, the Void Source Ancestor, such a powerful existence, does not have many eternal resources, the point is that he has not bothered to collect them.

After all, the Void Source Ancestor didn't need the Eternal Resources, so where would he spend time collecting them!

Currently, the Void Source Hall only has sixteen Eternal Resources.

For the average first-class invincible, one eternal resource is enough, for the average Void Child, there is a high probability that more than five copies of Eternal Resources are needed, the first-class invincible person at the level of the Void God Son probably needs more than ten Eternal Resources, and the Void Child is about twenty parts of water.

But Ye Tian felt that he needed at least twenty-five or more Eternal Resources before he dared to guarantee that he would be able to raise the Endless Source Body to the level of the Endless Eternal Tribulation Body.

However, the Void Source Hall did not have twenty-five eternal resources, and there were still nine eternal resources.

Therefore, Ye Tian urgently needed to find eternal resources now.

"The main body is in the Void Source Hall to improve its cultivation and the Endless Source Body, and it's time for the copy body to go out and find eternal resources. Nine Eternal Resources, I don't know how long it will take to find them, we must find them in advance, otherwise when it is really time to impact the Supreme Realm, how can I have time to find them!"

Ye Tian muttered.

On the Void Origin Ancestor's side, Ye Tian didn't expect to get other eternal resources, even if he exchanged points for them, no one would exchange them.

The points of the Void Source Hall cannot be exchanged for eternal resources, and no one will be stupid to exchange eternal resources for the points of the Void Source Palace.

Unless you really meet someone who doesn't lack eternal resources, but is there such a person in the source sea?

"Jin Zu!"

Ye Tian thought of this fallen powerhouse, but unfortunately there were no eternal resources in the opponent's void ball, but from the other party's memory, Ye Tian knew a useful information.

Although there is no law in the birth of eternal resources, there is one thing in common, that is, eternal resources are born only where they are immortal.

For example, the eternal heaven and earth, or the eternal treasure land, forbidden land, of course, the source sea is also eternal and immortal, so it is possible to give birth to eternal resources in the void of the source sea.

However, the Source Sea is too big, so it is too difficult to find eternal resources in the Source Sea.

Therefore, many first-class invincible people want to go to those treasures or even forbidden places that have existed for an incomparably long time to find eternal resources.

Especially in the forbidden land, there is a high probability of having eternal resources, because no one dares to enter it for a long time, so even if the eternal resources are born, no one dares to look for them.

And even if the eternal resources of the treasure land are born, they will be snatched away quickly, so there is not much hope for going to the treasure land to find the eternal resources.

At the beginning, the Heavenly Wind Source God found an eternal resource in the depths of the Yuanji Abyss, and together with the eternal resources found before, it completed the final transformation in one fell swoop, condensing the eternal tribulation body.

And the Yuan Extreme Abyss is because it is too dangerous, and it is rare for a first-class invincible person to go there, and there will be an eternal resource left.

"Machine Spirit!"

Ye Tian summoned the Void Source Hall Instrument Spirit.

The machine spirit immediately appeared, waiting for Ye Tian's orders.

Ye Tian said: "You should know something about the many forbidden places in the Source Sea, and list some forbidden places that are very likely to give birth to eternal resources!"
